create_salvage.ponder.shared.salvaging.m: A Basin can salvage unwanted tools and armor into raw materials.
Place a Mixer above the Basin and power it from the side.
Place a Blaze Burner and give it fuel.
Then, insert your unwanted tool, weapon, or armor piece into the heated Basin.
The output is Ingots and Nuggets equal to half the crafting cost of the item.
Damaged items output proportionally less metal.
Superheating the Blaze Burner lets you salvage the full value of metal items.
It also enables salvaging higher rarity items, like Diamond or Netherite.
You will only receive half the crafting cost of these higher rarity items.
create_salvage.ponder.shared.salvaging.s: Superheating the Blaze Burner lets you... hang on just a moment.
Do you see that? Right there, behind the basin?
Get this dingy contraption out of the way, I want a better look at whatever that... THING, is.
No, no, no, this is all wrong! How long has this... GREASY little chudling been LURKING here, waiting for the perfect chance to strike?
...this wasn't how it was supposed to go, you know.
I had the perfect scene, all choreographed and ready to show you.
I was supposed to show you how to Salvage your spare tools, I was supposed to bring KNOWLEDGE!
And look what that got me. Just this... GOBLIN. He's not even helping, he's just sitting there, silently JUDGING me for my failure.
I'm done. Scene's over. Go home.
